seams.description: Cortex transfer-truth envelope for prepared import/retrieval artifacts.
seams.degraded_behavior: Explicit transfer states: ready_for_transfer, denied, stale, integrity_failed, re_prep_required. No silent failure; orchestration fields forbidden.
seams.notes: Carries import-stage truth AuthorForge V1 Phase 4 wants; producer side is document-and-version, not build.

seams.degraded_behavior: Candidate-only; never canonical. Absent semantic lane degrades to no-handoff.
STRICT_STRUCTURED, fail_closed: schema failure or missing evidence is a hard failure, never prose fallback.
seams.notes: This is the continuity seam consumers must bind to today.

seams.description: Planned broader scene-window continuity contract (distinct scope from adjacent_scene).
seams.degraded_behavior: Not yet served. Requests are not satisfied as adjacent-scene work.
seams.notes: Drift record: AuthorForge's AI contract adapter currently binds to this planned id; it should bind to analyze.continuity.adjacent_scene.v1 until this is promoted.

seams.description: Cortex-to-FA-Local bounded GNAT syntax-extraction dispatch under policy/capability checks.
seams.degraded_behavior: Fail-closed admission: unknown requester/policy/capability is denied with a structured DenialGuard.

seams.description: Callable local-agent admission + review-package handoff gate.
seams.degraded_behavior: Callable end-to-end via AdmissionService::admit and the fa-local-run 'admit' CLI (three-layer admission, posture resolution, review-package emission). Still library/CLI only; no daemon/API/persistence.
seams.notes: AuthorForge V1 Track A/B treated this as future; the callable seam now exists (CLI + library facade), so it is partial rather than planned. A daemon/API remains deferred by fa_local doctrine.

seams.degraded_behavior: Non-reporting services are represented fail-closed as unavailable/not_ready, never omitted.

seams.description: Deterministic low/elevated/critical runtime pressure derived from the service matrix.
seams.degraded_behavior: Pure function of a matrix snapshot; no hidden state. Absent matrix yields no indicator.

seams.description: This governance catalog of live local-runtime seams.
seams.degraded_behavior: Static catalog; maturity field marks planned-vs-served so consumers cannot silently bind to unserved contracts.
